mapper.sql: id, employee_id, basic_salary, position_salary, performance_salary, probation_ratio, social_insurance_base, housing_fund_base, status, effective_date, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM salary_account WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY effective_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT sa.* FROM salary_account sa INNER JOIN employee e ON sa.employee_id = e.id WHERE sa.status = 1 AND e.status IN (1, 2)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_account ( employee_id, basic_salary, position_salary, performance_salary, probation_ratio, social_insurance_base, housing_fund_base, status, effective_date, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{basicSalary}, #{positionSalary}, #{performanceSalary}, #{probationRatio}, #{socialInsuranceBase}, #{housingFundBase}, #{status}, #{effectiveDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE salary_account SET basic_salary = #{basicSalary}, position_salary = #{positionSalary}, performance_salary = #{performanceSalary}, probation_ratio = #{probationRatio}, social_insurance_base = #{socialInsuranceBase}, housing_fund_base = #{housingFundBase}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE salary_account SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
